zh.Middleton Hall, Lancashire, England: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾米德萊頓
zh.Glassbrock, Buckinghamshire, England: 英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾
zh.Ashton-Under-Lyne, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾阿希頓-德-林
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard de Ashton於大約1444年出生在英國藍卡爾米德萊頓時，他的父親SIR RALPH ASHTON24歲，母親LADY MARGARET DE BARTON24歲。他於1480年7月29日與Lady Isabel Talbot在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1507年5月28日在英國英格蘭藍卡爾米德萊頓享年64歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭藍卡爾米德萊頓。

zh-hans.Ashton-Under-Lyne, Lancashire, England: 英国藍卡爾阿希頓-德-林
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard de Ashton于大约1444年出生在英国藍卡爾米德萊頓时，他的父亲SIR RALPH ASHTON24岁，母亲LADY MARGARET DE BARTON24岁。他于1480年7月29日与Lady Isabel Talbot在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1507年5月28日在英国英格兰藍卡爾米德萊頓享年64岁，埋葬在英国英格兰藍卡爾米德萊頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ashton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places so called, especially Ashton-under-Lyne near Manchester. Most are named from Old English æsc ‘ash tree’ + tūn ‘settlement’; the one in Northamptonshire is (æt thǣm) æscum ‘(at the) ash trees’. Others have been assimilated to this from different sources. The one in Devon is ‘the settlement (tūn) of Æschere’, while the one in Hertfordshire is ‘the settlement of Ælli’.

variants.name: Aspden
meanings: English: habitational name from Aspden (alias Aspen) in Oswaldtwistle, Lancashire. This surname has been confused with   Ashton   and   Austin  , and probably also with   Aston   and   Astin  , all of which are common surnames in Lancashire.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard de Ashton was born about 1444, in Middleton, Lancashire, England, his father, SIR RALPH ASHTON, was 24 and his mother, LADY MARGARET DE BARTON, was 24. He married Lady Isabel Talbot on 29 July 1480, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 28 May 1507, in Middleton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 64, and was buried in Middleton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard de Ashton est né environ 1444, à Middleton, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, SIR RALPH ASHTON, avait 24 ans et sa mère, LADY MARGARET DE BARTON, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Lady Isabel Talbot le 29 juillet 1480, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 28 mai 1507, à Middleton, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Middleton, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Richard de Ashton um 1444 in Middleton, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater SIR RALPH ASHTON 24 und seine Mutter LADY MARGARET DE BARTON 24. Er hat am 29. Juli 1480 in England Lady Isabel Talbot geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 28. Mai 1507 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Middleton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Middleton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard de Ashton è nato il circa 1444 nel Middleton, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, SIR RALPH ASHTON, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, LADY MARGARET DE BARTON, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Lady Isabel Talbot il 29 luglio 1480, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 28 maggio 1507, nel Middleton, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Middleton, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard de Ashtonが約1444年にイギリスランカシュアイアミッドレトンで生まれた時，父SIR RALPH ASHTONは24歳，母LADY MARGARET DE BARTONは24歳であった。1480年7月29日にイギリスでLady Isabel Talbotと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1507年5月28日にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアミッドレトンで64歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアミッドレトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard de Ashton(이)가 대략 1444년 영국 랭카실르 미들레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 SIR RALPH ASHTON(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 LADY MARGARET DE BARTON(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1480년 7월 29일 영국에서 Lady Isabel Talbot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1507년 5월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 미들레턴에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 미들레턴에 묻혔다.

mn.Middleton Hall, Lancashire, England: Middleton, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard de Ashton nasceu aproximadamente 1444, em Middleton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, SIR RALPH ASHTON, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, LADY MARGARET DE BARTON, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Isabel Talbot em 29 de julho de 1480, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 28 de maio de 1507, em Middleton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Middleton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard de Ashton родился около 1444 г. в местности миддлетон, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени SIR RALPH ASHTON было 24 года, а матери, которую звали LADY MARGARET DE BARTON, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Isabel Talbot 29 июля 1480 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 28 мая 1507 г. в местности миддлетон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности миддлетон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Richard de Ashton nació aproximadamente 1444, en Middleton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, SIR RALPH ASHTON, tenía 24 años y su mamá, LADY MARGARET DE BARTON, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Lady Isabel Talbot el 29 de julio de 1480, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 28 de mayo de 1507, en Middleton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Middleton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
